description: Single source of truth for the Bun riscv64-linux-musl cross-build. Read by build.sh + Dockerfile build args + any downstream artifact-hosting publish step. Bump these together with the matching webkit-patches/ and bun-patches/ series.

bun.rationale: Pinned to match stage-android-agent.mjs:BUN_VERSION + DEFAULT_BUN_CHANNEL so the resulting binary stays compatible with the rest of the Android agent matrix. Canary tracks the same 1.3.13+ fix train as the arm64/x64 artifacts that staging downloads.

webkit.rationale: Bun's WebKit fork has zero riscv64 patches. We checkout this commit, then rebase the WebKit-side riscv64 enablement series (webkit-patches/) onto it. If rebase fails, fall back to upstream WebKit/WebKit at the matching git-svn revision and re-apply Bun's JavaScriptCore touch-ups manually — see webkit-patches/README.md.
webkit.jit_rationale: Upstream WebKit ships LLInt + Baseline JIT for riscv64 (WebKit bugs #229035 r281757 2021-08-30 and #239708 r293316 2022-04-25). DFG/FTL are still NEW (bugs #238006, #239707). On-device agent runtime is dominated by native llama.cpp + network IO, so the missing tiers cost us little. Build sets ENABLE_BASELINE_JIT=ON, ENABLE_DFG_JIT=OFF, ENABLE_FTL_JIT=OFF, ENABLE_C_LOOP=OFF. If Baseline build fails on the picked WebKit commit, retry with ENABLE_C_LOOP=ON + Baseline=OFF — build.sh exposes BUN_RISCV64_FORCE_CLOOP=1 for that path.

cherry_pick_targets.rationale: These two SHAs bracket the cherry-pick chain that needs to land on top of webkit.fork_commit. The full ordered list is in webkit-patches/0001-cherry-pick-llint-riscv64.recipe. An operator with two WebKit clones produces the patch series mechanically from this range.

llvm.rationale: Pinned by Bun upstream (LLVM_VERSION in scripts/build/config.ts on main). Mismatches between the LLVM used to build WebKit/Bun and the one packed into the artifact cause memory-allocation failures at runtime.

zig.rationale: Bun's codegen uses Zig 0.14+ (target syntax: <arch>-<os>-<abi>). 0.14.1 accepts `riscv64-linux-musl`. The codegen runs on the build host (x86_64) and emits source files that are then compiled by clang for the target, so the Zig binary itself does not have to be a riscv64 build.

rust.rationale: Bun pins this exact nightly via rust-toolchain.toml. riscv64gc-unknown-linux-musl is a Tier-2 target with prebuilt std, so we get it via `rustup target add` rather than -Zbuild-std.

musl.rationale: Alpine v3.21 ships musl 1.2.5 across all arches including riscv64. Matching musl versions between the Bun binary and the Android runtime sysroot is mandatory — the ld-musl-riscv64.so.1 we pack with the APK comes from this same Alpine branch.

dependencies._rationale: Everything outside WebKit + TinyCC builds on riscv64gc-linux-musl with no patches. TinyCC has no riscv64 backend in oven-sh/tinycc, so we disable bun:ffi JIT-compile for this artifact.

boringssl.notes: Uses C fallbacks for AES on riscv64.

tinycc.rationale: oven-sh/tinycc fork has no riscv64-gen.c / riscv64-asm.c / riscv64-link.c — the upstream `mob` branch lands the riscv64 backend ad-hoc but it has never been merged into oven-sh/tinycc. Disabling means bun:ffi JIT-compile is unavailable on riscv64; static FFI bindings still work. Acceptable for the Android agent runtime.

artifact.matches_rationale: stage-android-agent.mjs:ensureBunBinary unzips and expects the inner directory to be `bun-linux-${bunArch}-musl`. Keeping the layout identical to upstream's other release zips lets the existing fetch path work unmodified once MILADY_BUN_RISCV64_URL is set.

patch_series._rationale: SHA256 of every patch + recipe under bun-patches/ and webkit-patches/. validate.sh checks these match before invoking the build. Bump alongside the patch content.
patch_series.bun_patches_apply_status: All 7 patches verified to apply cleanly in sequence to a fresh clone of oven-sh/bun @ bun-v1.3.13 via `git apply --check` and full sequential `git apply` (validated 2026-05-19). Touch 7 files, +56/-11 lines total.
patch_series.webkit_recipes_status: Recipe files document the cherry-pick chain that an operator with two WebKit clones must realize into actual `*.patch` files before the Baseline-JIT build path is testable. Until realized, build.sh proceeds with C_LOOP fallback when BUN_RISCV64_FORCE_CLOOP=1 is set.
